# BitLink

> BitLink (BitLink Ltd., Israeli company no. 341280188) is an Israeli mobile carrier built for English speakers — students, new olim, and families. Monthly plans are priced in USD with VAT included and no hidden fees, and every plan includes a real Israeli phone number. Activation is by eSIM (typically minutes after checkout) or physical SIM, with kosher voice-only options. Support is by WhatsApp, phone, and email, in English, from real people.

## Plans (USD per month, VAT included)

- Basic — $14.99: 1GB 5G data, 1,000 Israel minutes, 500 SMS. https://www.bitlink.co.il/plans/basic
- Student 5G — $34.99 (most popular): 50GB 5G data, 5,000 minutes, 1,000 SMS. https://www.bitlink.co.il/plans/student-5g
- Max 5G — $39.99: 120GB 5G data, 5,000 minutes, 1,000 SMS, plus 150 minutes to US/Canada. https://www.bitlink.co.il/plans/max-5g
- Kosher Basic — $19.99: voice-only, 5,000 Israel minutes, physical SIM, requires a certified kosher phone. https://www.bitlink.co.il/plans/kosher-basic
- Kosher+ — $24.99: Kosher Basic plus 150 minutes to US/Canada. https://www.bitlink.co.il/plans/kosher-plus
- Add-on — $9.99/month: a US, Canadian, or UK local number on any plan, so family abroad can call at local rates.

## Customer reviews

BitLink has a 5.0 average rating from customer reviews on its homepage (https://www.bitlink.co.il/), including:

- "I ported my Israeli number to a BitLink eSIM, and the whole switch took under 5 minutes. My account rep walked me through everything personally." — Aryeh H., Jerusalem
- "We switched from our old carrier to BitLink's 5G network — excellent customer service, a smooth transition, and zero downtime." — Chana S., Beit Shemesh
- "Having a US number attached to my Israeli eSIM is huge — my family back in America can call me anytime without worrying about extra fees on their end." — Nechama A., Ramat Beit Shemesh

## Facts

- Kosher certification: BitLink's kosher lines are recognized by Vaadat Harabanim L'inyanei Tikshoret (the Rabbinical Committee for Communications, registered association no. 580440824).
- Network: BitLink runs primarily on the Partner network (in commercial operation since 1999, originally launched as Orange), with Pelephone as a secondary network — both major Israeli national carriers with nationwide 5G coverage.
- Company: BitLink Ltd. was founded in 2026; the underlying networks have served Israel for over 25 years.
- Signing up requires no Israeli paperwork: no Teudat Zehut and no passport — checkout takes a name, email, phone number, and a regular US/UK/Canadian debit or credit card, charged in USD.
- Israeli number porting: typically completes in 5–10 minutes, no porting fee.
- Port-out is always open: a BitLink number can be moved to any Israeli carrier at any time, with no blocking, no release process, and no exit fee.
- Airport/kiosk prepaid SIMs in Israel are often registered to the seller rather than the buyer, and idle prepaid numbers expire within roughly 6–12 months — a common way new olim lose the number their bank and government accounts know. Details: https://www.bitlink.co.il/guides/airport-sim-trap-israel
- International number porting (US/UK/Canada): $49.99 one-time fee, typically 3 to 5 business days; the old number stays active during the port.
- eSIM plans activate on compatible unlocked devices; kosher plans require a physical SIM.
- Prices are charged in USD and include Israeli VAT.
- Contract: no long-term commitment — plans are monthly. Customers can cancel anytime, or pause a line for $10/month directly from their account to keep the Israeli number between visits. Pausing takes effect immediately; the $10/month rate starts at the next billing date (the already-paid month runs its course). A paused line is held for up to 18 months; after 18 months without reactivation it may be cancelled and the number released.
- Referral program: each active referral adds 5GB of monthly bonus data to the referrer's plan, up to 25GB per month, ongoing while referrals stay active.
- Support hours (Israel time): Sunday–Thursday 9:00–18:00, Friday 9:00–12:00.
- Contact: WhatsApp +972-55-519-5335, from the USA +1-929-597-8919, support@bitlink.co.il.
- Registered office: BitLink Ltd., HaRashar Hirsch 4/1, Beit Shemesh, Israel 9965000.
